hero.lead: Describe your post once. Loritalk writes a native version for every connected platform, generates on-brand images, runs every word through automated moderation, and schedules them — in seconds.

briefCard.label: Your brief · 1 of 1
briefCard.typed: Launch our new sustainable sneaker. Made from 80% recycled ocean plastic. Targeting Gen Z runners.

items.title: Hours wasted adapting
items.description: You write a post for Instagram, then rewrite it for LinkedIn, then again for X. Every platform needs different tone, length, and hashtags.

items.title: AI that sounds generic
items.description: Single-model AI gives you one version that sounds like everyone else. No brand voice, no platform awareness, no real optimization.

items.title: Team bottlenecks
items.description: Content waits for approval, gets lost in Slack threads, and nobody knows what's scheduled for next week.

solution.title: Loritalk fixes all of that
solution.subtitle: One briefing. A native version for every platform. On-brand images rendered in parallel.

rows.before: 1 post = 45 min adapting to each platform
Generic AI text reused across every network
rows.after: A native version per channel — length, hashtags and tone adapted

rows.before: Content scattered across tools and threads
rows.after: One dashboard: create, approve, schedule, publish, track

features.title: Everything your content team needs
features.subtitle: From idea to published post — Loritalk handles the entire workflow.

items.title: Platform-native content
items.description: One brief becomes a native version for each platform — length, hashtags, emoji and tone adapted to Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, Threads and Telegram.

items.title: On-brand image generation
items.description: Images rendered per platform with the right aspect ratio and your persona's visual rules — feed posts, stories, hero crops. No more manual resizing.

items.title: Multilingual generation
items.description: Generate in Portuguese, English, Spanish and more. Native-level fluency with cultural nuance — not just translation.

items.title: Schedule & publish
items.description: Calendar view, scheduled publishing, and direct posting to all connected channels. Different times per platform.

items.title: Brand voice & personas
items.description: Create AI personas that write like your brand. Control tone from professional to playful. Every post sounds like you, not a robot.

items.title: Analytics dashboard
items.description: Track reach, engagement, clicks and growth per channel. KPI cards, top posts and Lori Insights surface what's working.

howItWorks.title: Brief → preview → publish.
howItWorks.subtitle: You never pick a model. You never resize an image. You never copy-paste between tabs.

steps.title: Write your brief
steps.description: One sentence or three paragraphs. Pick the channels, the persona, and the language. That's the only thing you write today.

steps.title: AI tailors it per channel
steps.description: Loritalk reads your brief, your persona and each platform's native rules — then crafts a version made for each channel. Automated moderation runs before you see it.

steps.title: Publish or schedule
steps.description: Send now or drop into the calendar with per-platform timing. Each channel ships through its native API; failures are isolated — Instagram still goes even if Facebook hiccups.

briefViz.text: "Launch our new sustainable sneaker. Made from 80% recycled ocean plastic. Targeting Gen Z runners."

imagery.title: On-brand
imagery.subtitle: Image generation runs async and per-platform — no manual resizing, no off-brand stock. Single posts, carousels, story formats, hero crops. Every render references the active persona's visual rules.

tiles.instagramCaption:

Built v2 before the team logged on.
tiles.storyQuote: we hit 1M MRR the same week we removed half the roadmap.
tiles.linkedinTitle: We hired 3 contractors before our first full-time. Here's the spreadsheet.
tiles.xBody: most "founder content" is a press release in a hoodie. write like a person. #shipping

useCases.title: Built for teams that publish
useCases.subtitle: Whether you're a solo creator or a 50-person agency.

items.title: Solo creators & freelancers
items.description: Stop spending hours adapting content. Write once, publish everywhere. Focus on strategy, not copy-pasting.

items.title: Marketing teams
items.description: One workspace per brand. Calendar view per workspace. Everyone knows what's publishing and when.

items.title: Agencies
items.description: Manage multiple brands from one account. Workspace per client with isolated channels, personas and calendar. Per-channel analytics for every brand.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Credit-based. Cancel anytime. Yearly saves you two months.
pricing.promoExplainer: First-year promo: receive 2× credits EVERY month for your entire first year when you choose Annual — that's {{count}} bonus credits each month.
pricing.promoHeroExtra: (+{{count}} bonus credits every month for 12 months)

PLUS.name: Plus
PLUS.description: For consistent and easy AI content creation

items.a: Loritalk produces a native version of your brief for each connected channel and renders on-brand images in parallel. Everything passes through an automated moderation layer before reaching your dashboard.

items.q: How is this different from other AI tools?
items.a: Other tools give you one block of text to copy-paste everywhere. Loritalk produces native versions per platform — length, hashtags, emoji and tone adapted to each network — and publishes through each platform's official API.
LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, X, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Threads and Telegram — eight networks via native APIs.

Your data is stored on servers in the European Union. The AI providers we use (OpenAI for text, Google for images) operate under their enterprise API terms — content sent to the API is not used to train their general-purpose models.

items.q: Can I use it with my team?
items.a: Yes. Create workspaces for each brand and invite team members with admin or publisher roles. Each workspace has its own connected channels, personas and calendar.
Paid plans kick in, but every Beta user keeps their current rate locked forever. No surprises.

ctaBanner.headline: Stop writing. Start publishing.
ctaBanner.subtitle: Join the Beta — free access, no credit card, and your rate is locked forever when we launch.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.body: Strictly necessary cookies keep the site working. With your consent we also load Google Analytics to measure traffic and the Meta Pixel to measure our advertising. You can accept, refuse, or pick category by category — and change your mind at any time.
cookieBanner.necessaryDesc: Required for the site to work (language and your consent choice). Cannot be disabled.
cookieBanner.analyticsDesc: Loads Google Analytics 4 to measure traffic and improve the site. Sets _ga and _ga_* cookies and transmits page-view data to Google.
cookieBanner.marketingDesc: Loads the Meta Pixel (Facebook / Instagram) so we can measure ad campaigns. Sets _fbp and _fbc cookies and transmits page-view data to Meta.

hero.lead: Loritalk gives your agency one workspace per brand, a dedicated persona per client and native publishing across 8 networks — so your team writes once and publishes everywhere, on every account.
hero.hubBody: Each client gets its own workspace, personas, channels and analytics. Switch context in one click.

pains.title: Recognise your week?
pains.subtitle: The same content rewritten 7 times for 5 clients. Every week. We've been there.

items.title: Juggling 5+ clients at once
items.description: Each brand wants a different tone, different platforms, different deadlines. Spreadsheets and Slack threads aren't a workflow.

items.title: Brand voice drifts every post
items.description: Different copywriters, different tabs, different ChatGPT prompts. The voice your client signed off on six months ago is gone.

items.title: Friday-night reschedules
items.description: Client asks for last-minute changes across Instagram, LinkedIn and TikTok. You rewrite the same idea three times — and miss the slot anyway.

items.title: Reporting takes a full day
items.description: Copying impressions, engagement and clicks from five dashboards into a deck. Manually. Every month.

benefits.title: Everything your agency needs in one place
benefits.subtitle: From the brief to the report — Loritalk runs the whole content pipeline for every brand you manage.

items.title: One workspace per client
items.description: Isolated workspaces with their own connected channels, personas, members and calendar. Spin up a new client in minutes.

items.title: Brand-voice personas
items.description: Define a persona per client — voice, tone, specific instructions. Every generation for that workspace respects the brief, every time.

items.title: 8 networks, one brief
items.description: Write the brief once and receive native versions for Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, Threads and Telegram — all in seconds, all via official APIs.

items.title: Per-workspace calendar
items.description: Each client has its own week / month / queue view. Schedule posts per channel and see the full pipeline for that brand at a glance.

items.title: Admin + publisher roles
items.description: Invite team members per workspace as admin (full management) or publisher (create and publish). Workspaces are fully isolated from each other.

items.title: Per-workspace analytics
items.description: Reach, engagement, clicks and growth per channel inside every client's workspace. KPI cards, top posts and Lori Insights — without jumping between dashboards.

workflow.title: How an agency week looks on Loritalk
workflow.subtitle: Onboard a brand, brief the AI, get sign-off, ship. Repeat for every client.

steps.title: Spin up the client workspace
steps.description: Create a workspace, connect the brand's social accounts and configure the persona — voice, tone, specific instructions. Ready to use in minutes.

steps.title: Write one brief per campaign
steps.description: Pick the persona, channels and language. Loritalk generates a native version per platform in seconds.

steps.title: Edit in your team
steps.description: Your team reviews the drafts inside the workspace — tweak copy, swap images, pick the strongest variant per channel before it goes out.

steps.title: Publish & track
steps.description: Native APIs push to every channel. Performance flows back into the per-workspace dashboard — KPIs, top posts and growth by channel.

plans.title: Plans built for agencies
plans.subtitle: Run a handful of brands or a whole client roster. Pick the volume that matches your retainer.
plans.customCreditsDetail: Volume agreed per contract — no surprise overage.

CUSTOM.name: Custom
CUSTOM.description: For networks and large agencies that need bespoke volumes and onboarding.

items.q: How are credits shared across clients?
items.a: Credits live at the agency account level — any workspace can consume from the same pool. Track usage in the billing dashboard.

items.q: What happens when we onboard or off-board a client?
items.a: Spin up a new workspace in seconds. Archiving a workspace removes it from the active view; full account deletion respects GDPR retention rules.

items.q: Which social networks can we publish to?
items.a: Native publishing covers LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, X, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Threads and Telegram — eight networks, each via the official platform API, so failures stay isolated per channel.

items.q: Can clients log in to see their workspace?
items.a: Not today. Workspaces are agency-team only — admin and publisher roles. Client access is on the roadmap.

cta.headline: Ready to scale content across every client?
cta.subtitle: Start with the Ultra plan today or book a 20-minute demo with the agency team to see Loritalk on your own brands.

hero.lead: Loritalk turns one brief into native posts for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, X, Threads and more — keeping your voice consistent across every account.
hero.hubBody: Define your persona once. Loritalk adapts every post to each platform — length, hashtags, emoji, tone, image format.

pains.title: Sound like your week?
pains.subtitle: Posting every day on every platform shouldn't cost you a Sunday afternoon. We've been there.

items.title: Same idea, rewritten 8 times
items.description: Caption for Instagram, script for TikTok, hook for YouTube, thread for X… every platform needs a different shape. You burn an afternoon on one post.

items.title: Algorithms punish gaps
items.description: Miss two days and the reach drops. Stay consistent across every platform and you barely have time to film, let alone live your life.

items.title: Brand deals demand multi-platform
items.description: Sponsors want Reels + Shorts + TikTok + post. Same campaign, four formats. You charge for one and deliver four.

items.title: Voice gets diluted
items.description: By post fifteen, the captions sound like a stranger wrote them. The audience can tell. Engagement drops.

benefits.title: Everything a creator needs in one place
benefits.subtitle: Brief once, ship everywhere — without losing the voice your audience follows.

items.title: Your voice, locked in
items.description: Train a persona on your past posts, your favourite phrases, your do's and don'ts. Every generation sounds like you — not like an AI tool.

items.title: One brief, eight native posts
items.description: Write the idea once. Loritalk produces a version optimized for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, X, Threads, Facebook, LinkedIn and Telegram in seconds.

items.title: On-brand images per format
items.description: Feed posts, stories, hero crops, vertical for Reels and Shorts. Images are rendered with the right aspect ratio and your persona's visual rules.

items.title: Schedule a week in one sitting
items.description: Plan Monday-to-Sunday across every platform inside one calendar. Native APIs push automatically — even when you're filming the next batch.

items.title: See what's growing
items.description: Reach, engagement, clicks and follower growth per channel. KPI cards and Lori Insights surface what's working — double down on it.

items.title: Moderated before it ships
items.description: Every draft passes through automated moderation, so brand-safe content reaches your audience and your sponsors stay happy.

workflow.title: How a creator week looks on Loritalk
workflow.subtitle: Capture your voice once, brief one idea, ship across every platform, watch what grows.

steps.title: Define your persona
steps.description: Drop reference posts, set tone and house rules. Your persona becomes the lens every future post passes through.

steps.title: Brief one idea
steps.description: Type the concept, pick channels and language. Loritalk produces a native version per platform in seconds — captions, scripts, threads, hooks.

steps.title: Edit & schedule
steps.description: Polish the strongest variant per channel, queue everything in the calendar, walk away. APIs publish at the right time, in the right format.

steps.title: Watch what's working
steps.description: Per-channel analytics show what's pulling in reach and engagement. Iterate the angle, not the workflow.

plans.title: Plans built for creators
plans.subtitle: Start free during Beta. Pick the volume that matches how often you post.

items.a: That's the whole point of personas. Drop your past posts, set tone rules and house phrases — every generation passes through that lens. The more you tune the persona, the closer it gets.

items.q: Which platforms do you actually publish to?
items.a: Native publishing covers Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, X, Threads, Facebook, LinkedIn and Telegram — eight networks via official APIs. Failures on one channel never block the others.
Always. Loritalk produces a draft per channel — you pick, tweak and publish. Nothing goes live without you hitting the button (unless you've scheduled it).

items.q: What about images and short-form video scripts?
items.a: On-brand images are generated per platform with the right aspect ratio (square, vertical 9:16, hero). For short-form video you get the script, hook, on-screen text and caption — record the video, Loritalk handles the rest.
Yes. Beta access is free with generous limits. Every Beta user keeps their current rate locked forever when paid plans launch.

cta.headline: Stop rewriting. Start shipping.
cta.subtitle: Join the Beta — free, no credit card, your rate is locked forever when we launch.
